subcodes.title: Kitab-i-A'mal al-sana (sahifa) = Sahifa Fatimiyya (Epistle on the Devotional Deeds of the Year)
subcodes.first_line: Praised be to God Who hath, in very truth sent down the Book, a guidance and a remembrance for such as fear God. It is indeed a Book which sets forth regulations pertaining to the month(s) of God in the Qur'an
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی نزل الکتاب بالحق هدی و ذکری للخاشعین و انه لکتاب قد فصل فی حکم شهرالله فی القران هدی و رحمة من عندالله لقوم ساجدین
subcodes.subjects: @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @law of obligatory prayer
